note: Balancer V2 Vault user pre-sign surface triage. Current manifests cover single swaps and relayer approval; complex batch/liquidity/internal-balance paths are explicit deferred gaps, not silent omissions.

0x945bcec9.name: batchSwap
0x945bcec9.reason: deferred user swap path: faithful mapping requires cross-array assets[swaps[i].assetInIndex] / assetOutIndex resolution; current manifest DSL cannot express this without a resolver

0x7d3aeb96.name: deregisterTokens
0x7d3aeb96.reason: pool administration / asset-manager maintenance; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x8bdb3913.name: exitPool
0x8bdb3913.reason: deferred user liquidity path: requires userData enum decode plus dynamic token/amount array zipping before a faithful remove_liquidity ActionBody can be emitted

0x5c38449e.name: flashLoan
0x5c38449e.reason: integrator flash-loan callback primitive; not represented as a retail wallet safety ActionBody in this onboarding pass

0xb95cac28.name: joinPool
0xb95cac28.reason: deferred user liquidity path: requires userData enum decode plus dynamic token/amount array zipping before a faithful add_liquidity ActionBody can be emitted

0xe6c46092.name: managePoolBalance
0xe6c46092.reason: pool/asset-manager balance management; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x0e8e3e84.name: manageUserBalance
0x0e8e3e84.reason: deferred internal-balance bookkeeping path; can deposit/withdraw/internal-transfer assets and needs a dedicated ActionBody instead of pretending it is a simple ERC20 transfer

0xf84d066e.name: queryBatchSwap
0xf84d066e.reason: quote helper used as live-input source; nonpayable for revert-based simulation but not a user state-changing intent

0x09b2760f.name: registerPool
0x09b2760f.reason: pool registration / factory administration; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x66a9c7d2.name: registerTokens
0x66a9c7d2.reason: pool token registration / asset-manager setup; not a wallet user pre-sign intent

0x058a628f.name: setAuthorizer
0x058a628f.reason: governance/admin authorizer replacement; not a retail wallet user action

0x16c38b3c.name: setPaused
0x16c38b3c.reason: governance/emergency pause control; not a retail wallet user action

0xfa6e671d.name: setRelayerApproval
0xfa6e671d.reason: permission primitive: grants/revokes Balancer V2 relayer authorization for a user

0x52bbbe29.name: swap
0x52bbbe29.reason: user AMM action: Balancer V2 single-pool swap
